puzzleDescription: Build a simple menu system using a switch statement. Based on the choice (1-3), print the corresponding food item.
objective: Display a menu and print selected item: 1 for Burger, 2 for Pizza, 3 for Fries.
hints: Case 1 should print 'Burger', Case 2 'Pizza', and Case 3 'Fries'.
Don't forget the 'break;' for every case!
